title: citrus medica subsp. limonum
intro: Citrus medica subsp. limonum, also known as the lemon, is a plant species of the Rutaceae family, characterized by its sour taste and high acidity, primarily used for its fruit. The medicinal properties of Citrus medica subsp. limonum include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming lemon juice and zest include aiding in digestion, boosting the immune system, and providing relief from cold and flu symptoms. Citrus medica subsp. limonum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as lemon tea, lemon balm, and lemon essential oil, which are used to treat various health issues and promote well-being.
